articles.title: Redick Praises Lakers' Resilience Amid Injury‑Riddled 2025‑26 Season

He noted the team's depth and coaching adjustments as the primary reasons they remained in contention.

articles.title: Austin Reaves Details Recovery Process From Oblique Injury

Reaves explains his step‑by‑step recovery, noting that the Lakers secured a 3‑0 series lead while he was out, and he is now targeting a return before the playoffs conclude.
key_points: Reaves suffered a Grade 2 left oblique strain with an original 4‑6 week timeline.
He describes the daily rehab routine that has accelerated his healing.

key_points: Barrett’s three came with a friendly bounce and sealed the win in overtime.
